ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the victim */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "raceethnicity" TEXT /* Race/ethnicity of the victim */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the incident */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the incident */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the incident */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address where the incident occurred */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the incident occurred */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the incident occurred */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the incident location */,
  "victim_description" TEXT /* Description of the victim */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the law enforcement agency */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the agency is located */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of the agency (e.g., local, state, federal) */,
  "agency_description" TEXT /* Description of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "circumstances" (
  "circumstance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each circumstance */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident this circumstance belongs to */,
  "cause" TEXT /* Cause of the incident */,
  "armed" TEXT /* Whether the victim was armed */,
  "pop" INTEGER /* Population of the county where the incident occurred */,
  "share_white" REAL /* Share of the population that is white */,
  "share_black" REAL /* Share of the population that is black */,
  "share_hispanic" REAL /* Share of the population that is Hispanic */,
  "p_income" INTEGER /* Per capita income of the county */,
  "h_income" INTEGER /* Household income of the county */,
  "county_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the county */,
  "comp_income" REAL /* Comprehensive income of the county */,
  "county_bucket" INTEGER /* County bucket (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "nat_bucket" INTEGER /* National bucket (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "pov" REAL /* Poverty rate of the county */,
  "urate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the county */,
  "college" REAL /* College attainment rate of the county */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("circumstance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_circumstances_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_agencies" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency involved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fact_checks" (
  "fact_check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fact-check */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident this fact-check belongs to */,
  "fact_checker" TEXT /* Name of the fact-checker */,
  "fact_check_status" TEXT /* Status of the fact-check (e.g., pending, complete, disputed) */,
  "fact_check_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the fact-check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fact_check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fact_checks_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident this analysis belongs to */,
  "analyst" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., pending, complete, disputed) */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_analysis_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident this recommendation belongs to */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation */,
  "recommended_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or organization making the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., pending, implemented, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident this collaboration belongs to */,
  "collaborator" TEXT /* Name of the collaborator */,
  "collaboration_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident this data source belongs to */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
